mapper.insert: insert into sys_login_log_master ( sys_id, user_id , ip_address , login_datetime , logout_datetime , login_result , fail_reason, sys_plant_cd ) values ( #{uuid}, #{userId}, #{ip}, now(), null, #{successStatus}, #{errMsg}, #{sysPlantCd} )
mapper.update: update sys_login_log_master set logout_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{uuid}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_login_log_detail ( sys_id, link_sys_id , menu_cd , menu_open_datetime ) values ( #{menuUuid}, #{logUuid}, #{menuCd}, now() )
mapper.update: update sys_login_log_detail set menu_close_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{menuUuid}
update sys_login_log_master set logout_datetime = now() where logout_datetime is null
update sys_login_log_detail set menu_close_datetime = now() where menu_close_datetime is null
